summary: Bootstrapped ops control-plane files and home-decoration adapter config.
ops/*.yaml uses JSON-subset YAML in v1 so the control plane stays dependency-free while keeping YAML-compatible filenames.
Provisioned WebUI and Telegram-safe remote surfaces with whitelist-only actions and named verify profiles.
Validated schemas, routing rules, state transitions, and remote command restrictions with automated tests.
commands: node --test tests/ops/schema.test.mjs tests/ops/routing.test.mjs tests/ops/state-store.test.mjs tests/ops/remote.test.mjs tests/ops/engine.test.mjs
